tasks.title: Promote navigator-auth, lxml, reportlab to hard deps + bump to 0.2.0
tasks.parallelism_notes: Wave 1 step 1. Mechanical pyproject + version bump. Must run before any other Wave 1 task because Wave 1 code presumes hard imports of these deps.

tasks.title: Build parrot_formdesigner.controls package (registry + builtin seed)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Wave 1. Sequential before TASK-1042 because the api/ package imports controls.builtin at __init__ time.

tasks.title: Build parrot_formdesigner.api package — REST surface with hard navigator-auth
tasks.parallelism_notes: Wave 1. Single largest task. Migrates handlers/api.py + handlers/routes.py REST half, introduces render dispatcher, wires controls registry + 501 stub for /operations. Sequential — every later Wave 1 + Wave 2 task imports from api/.

tasks.title: Build parrot_formdesigner.ui package — HTML pages + Telegram WebApp
tasks.parallelism_notes: Wave 1. UI package migration (templates, FormPageHandler, TelegramWebAppHandler, setup_form_ui). File-disjoint from TASK-1042 but both share the handlers/ source folder, and we keep Wave 1 strictly sequential to avoid worktree merge conflicts.

tasks.title: Empty parrot_formdesigner/__init__.py and delete handlers/
tasks.parallelism_notes: Wave 1 final task. Deletes the dead handlers/ folder, rewrites __init__.py to metadata-only, adds the sys.modules snapshot test that future tasks must keep green. MUST run last in Wave 1.

tasks.title: XForms 1.1 renderer with xf:bind constraint expressions
tasks.parallelism_notes: Wave 2a. Touches renderers/xforms.py (new) and api/render.py (lazy-seed dict mutation). The api/render.py edit overlaps with TASK-1046's wiring; coordinate via lazy _seed_renderers() pattern documented in both task files. Per Q5: includes xf:bind constraint expressions (overrides spec Module 6 'structural only' wording).

tasks.title: PDF AcroForm fillable renderer (reportlab)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Wave 2b. Touches renderers/pdf.py (new), api/render.py (lazy-seed dict mutation), pyproject.toml test extras (pypdf). Overlaps with TASK-1045 on api/render.py only — minor merge, both follow the lazy-seed pattern.

tasks.title: Form-controls REST contract tests + extension hooks
tasks.parallelism_notes: Wave 2c. Adds contract tests + JSON Schema fixture + a docstring update on controls/registry.py. Touches no api/render.py wiring; fully disjoint from TASK-1045/1046/1048 in source files.

tasks.title: PATCH /api/v1/forms/{id}/operations — atomic batched edit API
tasks.parallelism_notes: Wave 2d. Replaces the 501 stub at api/operations.py created by TASK-1042. File-disjoint from TASK-1045/1046/1047. Includes Q1 If-Match concurrency support.
